zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD维持震荡偏强结构，价格稳定在1.05上方运行，并略高于20日均线1.046，短线呈整理上行态势，波动收敛但多头结构未破坏

MACD指标仍处于轻微负值区间，但柱状动能收缩，空头力量减弱，短期可能进入零轴附近修复阶段，市场缺乏明显方向信号

下方支撑位关注1.048与1.046均线区域，若失守可能回踩1.04整数关口；上方阻力位位于1.055及1.060，突破后或打开进一步上行空间

操作上建议维持低吸高抛思路，未有效跌破1.046前偏多对待，若放量突破1.06可顺势跟进，严格控制止损以应对震荡行情风险控制为先

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently in a narrow consolidation phase around 1.05294, showing mild upward bias after a 0.57% daily gain. Price trading just above the 20-period SMA at 1.04626 suggests short-term bullish control, but momentum remains limited due to lack of strong breakout. Overall structure indicates range-bound behavior with slight bullish pressure, as buyers defend lower levels while upside progress remains gradual and unconvincing so far.

The MACD reading at -0.000578 indicates lingering bearish momentum, though the small magnitude suggests weakening downside pressure rather than active selling. Without RSI confirmation, price action becomes more important, and current tight candles imply equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The signal line absence limits precision, but overall momentum appears to be stabilizing, hinting at a potential transition phase rather than a confirmed downtrend continuation or strong reversal.

Immediate support is found near 1.048, aligned with recent intraday lows, followed by stronger structural support at the 20-SMA around 1.046. A deeper downside break could expose the 1.040 psychological zone. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 1.053, the current session high, with a breakout potentially targeting 1.060 and then 1.080 as broader recovery levels if bullish momentum strengthens meaningfully.

For traders, the current setup favors range strategies until a clear breakout occurs. Buying near 1.046–1.048 with tight stops below 1.040 may offer favorable risk-reward for swing longs. Alternatively, breakout traders can wait for a sustained move above 1.053 before targeting higher resistance zones. Short positions are less attractive unless price decisively rejects resistance and MACD turns further negative, confirming renewed downside momentum.
